recommendations.title: The Remarkable Life of Ibelin
recommendations.overview: The secret life of a young World of Warcraft gamer is vividly reimagined when his online friends contact his family after his death.

recommendations.title: Alien Hunter
recommendations.overview: Government agents find evidence of extraterrestrial life at the South Pole.

recommendations.title: Moonage Daydream
recommendations.overview: A cinematic odyssey featuring never-before-seen footage exploring David Bowie's creative and musical journey.

recommendations.title: Spielberg
recommendations.overview: A documentary on the life and career of one of the most influential film directors of all time, Steven Spielberg.

recommendations.title: The True Cost
recommendations.overview: Film from Andrew Morgan.  The True Cost is a documentary film exploring the impact of fashion on people and the planet.

recommendations.title: The Show
recommendations.overview: An unsettling look at reality television, where a disturbing game show has its contestants ending their lives for the public's enjoyment.

recommendations.title: American Murder: The Family Next Door
recommendations.overview: Using raw, firsthand footage, this documentary examines the disappearance of Shanann Watts and her children, and the terrible events that followed.

recommendations.title: The Bourne Supremacy

recommendations.title: UFO
recommendations.overview: A college student, who sees a UFO, uses his exceptional math skills to investigate the sighting with his friends while the FBI follows closely behind.

recommendations.title: The Door
recommendations.overview: A successful artist loses control of his life after his young daughter's death. A chance for a new start appears, but all is not what it seems.
